0306_zj_zk.initialContent:
# Dungeon Generator
def gen_room(size):
    width = size * 2
    height = size
    return width, height

def gen_monster(level):
    hp = level * 50
    attack = level * 10
    return hp, attack

def gen_treasure(rarity):
    gold = rarity * 100
    item = pick_item(rarity)
    return gold, item

def gen_trap(danger):
    damage = danger * 25
    return damage

0307_bracket_z.initialContent:
class Castle:
    def gate(self):
        locked = True
        key = "golden"
        return locked
    def tower(self):
        height = 50
        guards = 3
        return guards
    def dungeon(self):
        prisoners = 5
        escape = False
        return escape
    def throne(self):
        king = "Arthur"
        crown = True
        return crown

0356_ctrl_w_i.initialContent:
# RPG System
MAX_LEVEL = 99
BASE_HP = 100

def level_up(hero):
    if hero.level < MAX_LEVEL:
        hero.hp += BASE_HP
        hero.level += 1

hero_hp = BASE_HP * 2

0359_ctrl_w_P.initialContent:
# Crafting
def forge(ore):
    return ore + 50

def brew(herbs):
    return herbs * 3

# Workshop
sword = forge(10)
potion = brew(5)

0360_ctrl_w_z.initialContent:
# Item Shop
def buy(item, gold):
    return gold - item.price

def sell(item, gold):
    return gold + item.price // 2

# Transaction
cost = buy(sword, 100)
earned = sell(potion, 50)
